---
id: retrieves-geographic-bounds-for-hexagon-data
title: "Retrieves geographic bounds for hexagon data"
description: "Returns the geographic bounding box for the user's location data within the specified date range"
sidebar_label: "Retrieves geographic bounds for hexagon data"
hide_title: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves geographic bounds for hexagon data"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/maps/hexagons/bounds"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the geographic bounding box for the user's location data within the specified date range
